intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“未来事件 -> 游客到来 -> 建设计划 -> Olympic City -> 道路和体育场 deadline -> 建筑设计 -> 第一次举办”的项目时间线读顺。注意在 in four years' time、by the end of this year、by the end of next year 后面自然小停顿。

sentences.text: The Olympic Games will be held in our country in four years' time.
sentences.focus_zh: will be held 是未来被动；in four years' time 是四年后，读成一个清楚的时间短语。

sentences.text: As a great many people will be visiting the country, the government will be building new hotels, an immense stadium, and a new Olympic-standard swimming pool.
sentences.focus_zh: 这是长句，要在 visiting the country 后小停；will be visiting 和 will be building 都表示未来某段时间正在发生。

sentences.text: They will also be building new roads and a special railway line.
sentences.focus_zh: also 要读出补充关系；new roads 和 a special railway line 是交通基础设施。

sentences.text: The Games will be held just outside the capital and the whole area will be called 'Olympic City'.
sentences.focus_zh: just outside the capital 是地点；will be called 是未来被动，说明这个区域将被叫作 Olympic City。

sentences.text: Workers will have completed the new roads by the end of this year.
sentences.focus_zh: will have completed 是未来完成时；by the end of this year 是截止日期，读清楚。
focus_words: by the end of this year

sentences.text: By the end of next year, they will have finished work on the new stadium.
sentences.focus_zh: 先读 deadline，再读结果；will have finished work on the new stadium 表示到明年年底已经完成体育场工程。
focus_words: By the end of next year

sentences.text: The fantastic modern buildings have been designed by Kurt Gunter. Everybody will be watching anxiously as the new buildings go up.
sentences.focus_zh: have been designed 表示已经被设计好；will be watching anxiously 要读出大家紧张关注建设进度。

sentences.text: We are all very excited and are looking forward to the Olympic Games because they have never been held before in this country.
sentences.focus_zh: looking forward to 表示期待；have never been held before 点出这是这个国家第一次举办奥运会。
